item.title: Vox 1.0.2
item.description:
# Vox 1.0.2
- Introduces the dark-first Vox Studio redesign across Create, Voices, History, and Settings. - Adds the V-wave brand system across Studio, the public site, native app icons, favicon, and the menu-bar Helper. - Simplifies Vox Helper around server state, primary lifecycle actions, pairing, files, diagnostics, and updates. - Improves Now Playing completion handling, generation progress contrast, and consistent dark controls, menus, and feedback. - Refreshes installation and Helper guidance for the signed package installer.
